Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x089B "TASKIII-0400-089B" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Task III (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0400 which: 1. Sets all of the nibbles in colour RAM to $0F to allow the loading screen to be displayed correctly. 2. Displays the loading screen and waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
